{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Collapse
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Silverlords]] seized [[Threshold]] during the [[Collapse]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The worst of the [[Collapse]] is behind [[Suriel]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“I’ve come to tell you in person that we have crested the wave,” Suriel said. “The worst of the Collapse is behind us.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
